title: 有馬記念の後に・さまよう

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder makes a valiant attempt, but
victory slips through her grasp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her spirits are further dampened by the thought
that this result would have been the same even if
Maruzensky had been in the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky is disappointed in Grass Wonder,
noting that she wasn't fully focused on the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only then does Grass Wonder realize she hasn't
truly clashed with her contemporaries.
